series_metadata.series_title: Payroll Warrant Records and Payroll Disbursement Records
series_metadata.series_description: Payroll records provided from OAKS system reporting module for Southern Ohio Agricultural and Community Development review and annual audit by Auditor of State.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved, move agency archive file and or no longer of agency value
